title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, discusses Anthropic's frontier models Fable and Mythos in an interview on the Big Technology Podcast. He describes how AI-native product development workflows have changed his process, emphasizing that Anthropic's safety measures are substantive rather than marketing, and addresses the tension between Anthropic operating as both a platform and a competing product company.
writeup: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, joins the Big Technology Podcast to discuss Anthropic's frontier models Fable and Mythos. He explains how AI-native product development workflows have reshaped his process, argues that Anthropic's safety measures are substantive rather than marketing, and addresses the tension of Anthropic operating as both a platform and a competing product company. The conversation matters because it comes from a leader who built consumer products at scale and now works inside a frontier lab, offering a view on how agents and safety factor into shipping AI products.
